intro_text: From aromatic Asian spices to vibrant African ingredients and rich Indian flavours — Asian Avenue brings the world to your doorstep. Visit one of our three stores across Germany.
prod_subtitle: A curated selection of authentic ingredients from across Asia, Africa, and India. Everything you need to bring the world's finest cuisines to your kitchen.
prod_asian_desc: From fragrant jasmine rice to rich soy sauces and crispy noodles — discover the essentials of Asian cooking.
prod_african_desc: Bold flavours from the African continent — plantain chips, palm oil, fufu flour, and much more.
prod_indian_desc: The heart and soul of Indian cooking — aromatic spices, basmati rice, lentils, and specialty ingredients.
prod_cta_title: Can't Find What You're Looking For?
prod_cta_text: Visit one of our stores for our full range, or contact us with special requests. We're always happy to help.
loc_subtitle: Three locations across Germany, ready to serve you with the finest international groceries.
partner_subtitle: Not near one of our stores? Our trusted partner shops carry our products and deliver to your door.
partner_jj_text: A trusted online destination for authentic South Asian groceries. Browse our selection on their platform and get your favourite products delivered.
partner_ab_text: Your go-to marketplace for Asian and international food products. Find Asian Avenue products alongside a wide range of grocery essentials.
partners_page_desc: Not near one of our stores? Our trusted partner shops carry Asian Avenue products and deliver straight to your door.
partner_jj_full_text: JJ Maveli is a trusted online destination for authentic South Asian groceries. They carry a wide selection of Asian Avenue products on their platform, making it easy to get your favourite ingredients delivered straight to your home.
partner_ab_full_text: Asian Bazar is your go-to online marketplace for Asian and international food products. They offer a broad selection of grocery essentials alongside Asian Avenue's curated products, making international grocery shopping easy and accessible.
partners_cta_text: Visit one of our three stores in Neuss, Ludwigshafen, or Mainz for the full Asian Avenue experience.
franchise_page_desc: We're expanding across Europe. If you're passionate about bringing authentic international groceries to your community, we'd love to hear from you.
why_proven_text: Three successful locations in Germany with a loyal customer base and growing brand recognition.
why_support_text: We provide guidance on store setup, supplier networks, branding, and operations from day one.
why_growing_text: The demand for authentic international groceries in Europe is rapidly increasing. Be part of the growth.
contact_desc: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 48 hours.
form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your interest in opening an Asian Avenue store...
form_note: We'll respond within 48 hours. Your information is kept private and secure.
franchise_title: Interested in Opening an Asian Avenue?
franchise_text: We're expanding across Europe. If you're passionate about bringing authentic international groceries to your community, we'd love to hear from you.
footer_desc: Bringing the finest Asian, African, and Indian groceries to Europe since day one. Three locations, one mission: authentic flavours for everyone.
